input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Documentation examples often use YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON files, but those formats are intentionally supplied by separate Hoplite modules; tests for hoplite-core should use MapPropertySource, system/environment property sources, or built-in .props/.properties parsing unless intentionally covering a separate format module.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core resolves with only Kotlin/coroutines runtime dependencies and includes the core loader, map/system/env/property sources, default decoders, service descriptors, and built-in .props/.properties parser, so meaningful coverage is reachable from the normal Kotlin test scaffold without extra dependencies, Docker, or environment setup.
